source_text: 1.4 Inspection Sticker The vehicle must have space for the Inspection Sticker(s) IN.13.2 that is: - A clear and unobstructed area, minimum 25 cm wide $\times 20 \mathrm{~cm}$ high - Located on the upper front surface of the nose along the vehicle centerline ## VE.1.5 Transponder / RFID Tag VE.1.5.1
